text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket seems unwell, so I take her to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer... I'll rest well and make sure to get
better.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay, good ni—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Snore...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gah! Wait... huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wh-where am I? Why am I here?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It sure is a pretty place, though! The grass is
rustling, the breeze is gently blowing...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I bet running at full speed here would feel sooo
good!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's give it a dash! Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yahooo! This is fun!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I feel like I could run forever!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Run... Run, run...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Agh! Where'd the grassy fields go?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohh! It was just a dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It was really nice! Thanks to that, my body and spirit feel totally refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is smiling happily. It seems she's
gotten a good amount of rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gagh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
M-my leg's stuck in the grass! And I'm slipping...
I'm falliiing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can't stooop! Help meee!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Eek! ...Huh? I'm alive?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Eeeesh... That was scary!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Winning Ticket's nap wasn't as
restful as it could have been...
